Aries.traits: Bold, ambitious, and energetic. You are a natural-born leader who thrives on competition and challenge.

Taurus.traits: Reliable, patient, and devoted. You value stability and enjoy the finer things in life.
Taurus.strengths: Reliable, patient, practical, devoted, responsible, stable

Gemini.traits: Versatile, expressive, and curious. You are a social butterfly with a brilliant mind that craves variety.
Gemini.strengths: Gentle, affectionate, curious, adaptable, ability to learn quickly

Cancer.traits: Intuitive, sentimental, and compassionate. You are deeply connected to your home and family.
Cancer.strengths: Tenacious, highly imaginative, loyal, emotional, sympathetic, persuasive

Leo.traits: Dramatic, outgoing, and self-assured. You are a born performer who loves to be in the spotlight.
Leo.strengths: Creative, passionate, generous, warm-hearted, cheerful, humorous

Virgo.traits: Analytical, kind, and hardworking. You pay close attention to detail and strive for perfection.
Virgo.weaknesses: Shyness, worry, overly critical of self and others, all work and no play

Libra.traits: Cooperative, diplomatic, and gracious. You seek balance and harmony in all aspects of life.
Libra.weaknesses: Indecisive, avoids confrontation, will carry a grudge, self-pity

Scorpio.traits: Resourceful, powerful, and brave. You are deeply emotional and possess an intense inner strength.
Scorpio.strengths: Resourceful, brave, passionate, stubborn, a true friend

Sagittarius.traits: Generous, idealistic, and adventurous. You are a free spirit with an insatiable thirst for knowledge.
Sagittarius.strengths: Generous, idealistic, great sense of humor
Sagittarius.weaknesses: Promises more than can deliver, very impatient, will say anything

Capricorn.traits: Responsible, disciplined, and masterful. You are a strategic thinker who plans for long-term success.
Capricorn.weaknesses: Know-it-all, unforgiving, condescending, expecting the worst

Aquarius.traits: Progressive, original, and independent. You are a visionary humanitarian who marches to your own beat.
Aquarius.weaknesses: Runs from emotional expression, temperamental, uncompromising, aloof

Pisces.traits: Compassionate, artistic, and intuitive. You are deeply empathetic and have a rich inner world.
Pisces.strengths: Compassionate, artistic, intuitive, gentle, wise, musical
Pisces.weaknesses: Fearful, overly trusting, sad, desire to escape reality

moon_signs.Aries: Your emotional nature is fiery and impulsive. You react quickly and passionately, often wearing your heart on your sleeve.
moon_signs.Taurus: Emotionally grounded and steady. You seek security and comfort, and your feelings run deep beneath a calm exterior.
moon_signs.Gemini: Your emotions are intellectually driven. You process feelings through communication and need mental stimulation to feel alive.
moon_signs.Cancer: Deeply nurturing and protective. Your emotions are powerful and intuitive — you feel everything on a profound level.
moon_signs.Leo: Emotionally warm and generous. You crave admiration and love, expressing your feelings with dramatic flair.
moon_signs.Virgo: Your emotional world is orderly and analytical. You express care through acts of service and practical support.
moon_signs.Libra: Emotionally harmonious and relationship-oriented. You need partnership and fairness to feel emotionally balanced.
moon_signs.Scorpio: Intense and transformative emotional nature. You feel deeply and are fiercely loyal, but guard your vulnerabilities closely.
moon_signs.Sagittarius: Emotionally optimistic and freedom-loving. You process feelings through adventure, philosophy, and expansive experiences.
moon_signs.Capricorn: Emotionally reserved and disciplined. You take your feelings seriously and express love through commitment and responsibility.
moon_signs.Aquarius: Emotionally detached yet humanitarian. You approach feelings intellectually and value independence in emotional bonds.
moon_signs.Pisces: Boundlessly empathetic and spiritually attuned. You absorb the emotions of others and possess a deeply compassionate soul.

ascendant_signs.Aries: You project confidence, energy, and directness. First impressions show you as bold and assertive.
ascendant_signs.Taurus: You appear calm, grounded, and dependable. Others see you as steady and aesthetically aware.
ascendant_signs.Gemini: You come across as witty, talkative, and curious. Your social energy is immediately noticeable.
ascendant_signs.Cancer: You appear nurturing, approachable, and sensitive. Others feel safe and comfortable around you.
ascendant_signs.Leo: You project charisma, warmth, and confidence. Your presence naturally commands attention.
ascendant_signs.Virgo: You appear meticulous, modest, and helpful. Others see you as organized and detail-oriented.
ascendant_signs.Libra: You come across as charming, graceful, and diplomatic. Others are drawn to your social elegance.
ascendant_signs.Scorpio: You project intensity, mystery, and magnetism. Your presence is powerful and deeply felt.
ascendant_signs.Sagittarius: You appear adventurous, optimistic, and philosophical. Others see you as a free-spirited explorer.
ascendant_signs.Capricorn: You project maturity, ambition, and seriousness. Others see you as reliable and authoritative.
ascendant_signs.Aquarius: You come across as unique, progressive, and independent. Your individuality is immediately apparent.
ascendant_signs.Pisces: You appear dreamy, compassionate, and artistic. Others sense your deep emotional and spiritual awareness.

Mercury.Aries: Quick thinker with a direct communication style. You speak your mind without hesitation.
Mercury.Taurus: Thoughtful and deliberate communicator. You think things through before speaking.
Mercury.Gemini: Brilliant and versatile mind. You excel at multitasking and love learning new things.
Mercury.Cancer: Intuitive communicator. You think with your heart and express yourself emotionally.
Mercury.Leo: Dramatic and creative thinker. You communicate with passion and flair.
Mercury.Virgo: Precise and analytical mind. You excel at detail-oriented thinking and problem-solving.
Mercury.Libra: Diplomatic communicator. You consider all sides before forming an opinion.
Mercury.Scorpio: Deep and probing thinker. You see beneath the surface and communicate with intensity.
Mercury.Sagittarius: Big-picture thinker. You communicate with enthusiasm and philosophical depth.
Mercury.Capricorn: Strategic and practical communicator. You think in terms of results and efficiency.
Mercury.Aquarius: Innovative and unconventional thinker. Your ideas are ahead of their time.
Mercury.Pisces: Imaginative and intuitive mind. You communicate through creative and artistic expression.

Venus.Aries: Passionate and impulsive in love. You pursue romance with enthusiasm and directness.
Venus.Taurus: Sensual and devoted lover. You value loyalty, comfort, and physical affection.
Venus.Gemini: Playful and intellectually stimulating in love. You need mental connection with partners.
Venus.Cancer: Nurturing and protective in love. You create emotional security in relationships.
Venus.Leo: Romantic and generous lover. You express love dramatically and crave admiration.
Venus.Virgo: Devoted and service-oriented in love. You show affection through practical care.
Venus.Libra: Harmonious and partnership-oriented. You are a true romantic who values beauty and balance.
Venus.Scorpio: Intense and transformative in love. Your emotional bonds are deep and all-consuming.
Venus.Sagittarius: Adventurous and freedom-loving in love. You seek a partner who shares your wanderlust.
Venus.Capricorn: Reserved but deeply committed. You approach love with seriousness and long-term vision.
Venus.Aquarius: Unconventional and independent in love. You value friendship and intellectual connection.
Venus.Pisces: Deeply romantic and compassionate. You love unconditionally and see the best in your partner.

Mars.Aries: Fierce and unstoppable energy. You are a warrior spirit who thrives on competition.
Mars.Taurus: Steady and persistent drive. You work tirelessly toward your goals with unshakable determination.
Mars.Gemini: Mentally agile and versatile energy. You channel your drive through communication and ideas.
Mars.Cancer: Protective and emotionally driven. You fight fiercely for your family and those you love.
Mars.Leo: Bold and dramatic energy. You pursue your goals with creative passion and confidence.
Mars.Virgo: Methodical and efficient drive. You channel energy into perfecting systems and processes.
Mars.Libra: Diplomatic action. You pursue goals through negotiation, partnerships, and strategic alliances.
Mars.Scorpio: Intensely focused and powerful energy. Your determination is relentless and transformative.
Mars.Sagittarius: Adventurous and expansive drive. You channel energy into exploration and higher learning.
Mars.Capricorn: Disciplined and ambitious energy. You pursue goals with strategic planning and endurance.
Mars.Aquarius: Rebellious and innovative energy. You fight for causes and push boundaries.
Mars.Pisces: Spiritually motivated and compassionate drive. You channel energy into creative and healing pursuits.

Jupiter.Aries: Growth through bold action and self-initiative. Fortune favors your courageous endeavors.
Jupiter.Taurus: Abundance through patience and material mastery. You attract wealth through practicality.
Jupiter.Gemini: Expansion through knowledge and communication. Your curiosity opens doors of opportunity.
Jupiter.Cancer: Growth through emotional intelligence and nurturing. Your empathy brings abundance.
Jupiter.Leo: Expansion through creativity and self-expression. Your generosity multiplies your fortune.
Jupiter.Virgo: Growth through service and analytical skills. Attention to detail brings professional rewards.
Jupiter.Libra: Abundance through relationships and diplomacy. Partnerships are your gateway to growth.
Jupiter.Scorpio: Transformation brings expansion. Your ability to regenerate leads to profound growth.
Jupiter.Sagittarius: Natural-born philosopher and explorer. Your optimism and vision attract boundless opportunities.
Jupiter.Capricorn: Growth through discipline and ambition. Your strategic approach to life yields lasting success.
Jupiter.Aquarius: Expansion through innovation and humanitarianism. Your progressive vision opens new frontiers.
Jupiter.Pisces: Spiritual growth and boundless compassion. Your intuition guides you to meaningful abundance.

Saturn.Aries: Lessons in patience and self-discipline. You are learning to temper impulse with wisdom.
Saturn.Taurus: Lessons in material responsibility. You are building lasting foundations through hard work.
Saturn.Gemini: Lessons in focused communication. You are learning to channel your ideas with discipline.
Saturn.Cancer: Lessons in emotional maturity. You are building inner security through self-reliance.
Saturn.Leo: Lessons in humble leadership. You are learning that true authority comes from authenticity.
Saturn.Virgo: Lessons in practical perfection. You are refining your skills through rigorous self-improvement.
Saturn.Libra: Lessons in balanced relationships. You are learning the discipline needed for true partnership.
Saturn.Scorpio: Lessons in emotional control. You are mastering the art of power through transformation.
Saturn.Sagittarius: Lessons in structured growth. You are learning to channel your vision through practical steps.
Saturn.Capricorn: Master of discipline and ambition. You possess natural authority and enduring determination.
Saturn.Aquarius: Lessons in structured innovation. You are learning to ground your visionary ideas in reality.
Saturn.Pisces: Lessons in spiritual discipline. You are learning to channel your compassion with healthy boundaries.
